title: Create a package using epiverse/packagetemplate
text: Go epiverse-trace/packagetemplate GH Click Use template, Create new repository Name repo click Create repository Clone repo developer machine Install dev dependency {etdev} using pak::pak("epiverse-trace/etdev") Run devtools::load_all() check errors Update DESCRIPTION NAMESPACE files Start developing Replace packagetemplate package name tests/testthat.R file

title: Create a package using epiverse/packagetemplate
text: Codecov, sign account follow instructions set Recon. Used image instead repo image appear broken might temporary. Updated render_readme.yml adding trailing -- git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- line 87. Based reference Also found GH Action logs script didn’t permission commit build README.md file repo. fixed allowing workflow permission read/write GH repo > Actions > General (scroll bottom)

title: Authors and Citation
text: Avinash Laddha. Author. James M. Azam. Author. Jaime . Pavlich-Mariscal. Contributor. Pratik Gupte. Author. Joshua W. Lambert. Author. Hugo Gruson. Author. Banky Ahadzie. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Laddha , Azam J, Gupte P, Lambert J, Gruson H, Ahadzie B (2023). numberizeR: Convert words numbers multiple languages. https://bahadzie.github.io/numberizeR/index.html, https://github.com/bahadzie/numberizeR.

Lambert and Hugo Gruson and Banky Ahadzie},   year = {2023},   note = {https://bahadzie.github.io/numberizeR/index.html, https://github.com/bahadzie/numberizeR}, }

what: Generate digits from text with spelt numbers in a supported language. — digits_from
title: Generate digits from text with spelt numbers in a supported language. — digits_from
text: Generate digits text spelt numbers supported language.

title: Generate digits from text with spelt numbers in a supported language. — digits_from
Generate digits from text with spelt numbers in a supported language. — digits_from
text: text Word(s) spell numbers. lang text's language. Currently one en|fr|es

title: Generate digits from text with spelt numbers in a supported language. — digits_from
Generate digits from text with spelt numbers in a supported language. — digits_from
code: if (FALSE) { digits_from("five hundred and thirty eight") # [1]   5 100  30   8 }

what:
Generate number from a numeric vector.
Uses digits_from() output to generate the numeric value of the text. — number_from
